/Volumes/Extreme SSD/JOSH/Photos/RAW_IMP.description: At a nighttime gathering, a man in a pink beanie and brown pullover smiles for a flash photo while holding a drink, standing next to another man in a black jacket, with a third person holding a cigarette on the left.

Two bearded men in sunglasses pose for an outdoor photograph on a partly cloudy day, with one man in a green t-shirt and the other in a blue hoodie holding a baby, against a backdrop of a flowing river and a forested hill.
Two bearded men in full winter gear stand smiling for a photo in deep snow on a mountainside, with a vast, overcast landscape of snow-covered evergreen trees behind them.
Two men pose for a photo on a city sidewalk in front of a brick storefront with a "BEADS ROCKS CRYSTALS" sign, while one man in a "VERMONT TECH" hoodie holds a bottle.

In a vintage studio portrait, two young, smiling brothers with matching bowl haircuts pose kneeling on a tan carpet, with the older boy in a shirt and tie embracing his younger brother, who wears a red jacket and shorts while holding a small teddy bear.

A 1983 Olan Mills studio portrait shows two young brothers with matching bowl haircuts, the older boy smiling in a plaid shirt while his younger sibling sits beside him in a graphic tee against a blue backdrop.

In a vintage, sunlit photograph, two young brothers in matching striped shirts stand smiling on a pebbly lakeshore, holding wooden canoe paddles with a red canoe resting at the water's edge behind them.

In a photograph dated December 23, 2008, two men in winter jackets and beanies stand together in a snowy, wooded backyard, with one holding a white cup and houses visible behind them through the bare trees.
In a faded vintage photograph, a young boy with a dark bowl haircut sits on a floral-patterned couch and holds a newborn baby in his lap next to a gold embroidered pillow.

In a vintage-style room, a young boy with a bowl haircut wearing a striped shirt leans over and playfully tickles his infant brother, who is laughing with delight while sitting in a blue and white plaid baby seat.
A vintage photograph shows two young boys, including Josh on the left, smiling as they play in deep snow that almost buries a car during a blizzard in a suburban neighborhood.

A young boy with a brown bowl haircut, wearing a red shirt, sits on a floral patterned couch with his arm around an infant in a light-colored sleeper, looking away thoughtfully with his hand near his mouth.
A vintage studio portrait captures two smiling young brothers, with the one in front wearing white overalls and the one behind in a red and green striped polo shirt, posed against a dark background.
In a vintage photograph, a young, smiling child with a brown bowl haircut sits on a floral couch and carefully feeds a newborn baby with a bottle held in their hands.

A nostalgic photograph captures two young boys smiling happily while sitting up to their chests in a massive pile of brown autumn leaves in a park on a sunny day, with trees and picnic tables visible in the background.

A warm-toned vintage photograph from the 1980s shows a smiling family of four, with parents holding their two young sons dressed in yellow pajamas while sitting together on a patterned living room couch.

A vintage photograph captures two young brothers kneeling on a bath mat in a tiled bathroom, where the older boy in blue denim overalls holds up a small yellow toy while the younger boy, Josh, beams with a wide grin in his colorful patterned overalls.

In a vintage-style kitchen with wood cabinets and linoleum flooring, a shirtless young boy in colorful shorts smiles while his younger toddler brother stands excitedly in a diaper and long-sleeved shirt next to a high chair.
Two young boys in matching yellow footed pajamas sit on a vintage floral-patterned couch with children's books, one laughing with delight while the other looks directly at the camera.

A vintage studio photograph captures two smiling young brothers with bowl haircuts kneeling on a carpet, with the older boy in a shirt and tie embracing his younger sibling who wears a red jacket and holds a small teddy bear in front of a mottled gray background.

In a vintage photograph, a smiling older child in a striped shirt playfully rests a hand on the head of a happy baby in yellow patterned pajamas as they lie together inside a large cardboard box on a brown carpeted floor.

A shirtless young boy with a brown bowl cut smiles warmly for the camera as he lies in bed under a white blanket, next to a jubilant baby in a blue shirt who is raising one arm in the air against a backdrop of blue and white striped sheets.

In a warm-toned vintage photograph, two young brothers in pajamas lie happily in a bed with a wooden spindle headboard, one smiling broadly at the camera while the other rests with his eyes closed, both clutching pacifiers.
A vintage photograph captures two young, smiling boys with bowl haircuts sitting on brick steps with their Easter baskets, holding up their new toys.
A diverse group of friends of various ages poses playfully for a photograph in a wood-paneled bar decorated with beer and Harley-Davidson advertisements.
A group of US Navy sailors in their Service Dress Blue uniforms stand in formation at attention during an indoor ceremony, with other military personnel and civilians visible in the background.

A smiling young man in a white shirt and a U.S. Navy sailor pose for a photo with a vintage deep-sea diving suit in what appears to be a museum or exhibition hall, with large shell casings displayed in the background.
A group of eight muscular men relax with beers in and around a swimming pool on a sunny day, with a large military unit rug laid out on the patio.

A muscular, shirtless instructor with a tattoo on his arm addresses a group of military divers in full scuba gear and a Jordanian officer in a blue camouflage uniform as they stand assembled on a wet concrete pier next to the sea.
A military parachutist in full desert gear, including a helmet and goggles, freefalls with his arms spread wide against a cloudy blue sky, as the jump plane flies above him.
A shirtless man in dark shorts is captured mid-air and upside down while performing a backflip off a black inflatable boat into the open ocean, with a ship visible on the horizon under a cloudy sky.

Three skydivers in freefall are captured mid-air, with two in tactical gear positioned in the foreground and a third farther away, all soaring high above a sprawling coastal landscape with a large body of water.
Four soldiers in desert camouflage and tactical gear, armed with rifles and a shotgun, pose for a group photograph in front of a large, tan armored vehicle at a military outpost.

Two skydivers in full gear, one wearing a desert camouflage jumpsuit and the other a grey and white suit, link up during a high-altitude freefall over a coastal landscape under a vast, clear blue sky.
A group of skydivers in tactical gear and wingsuits are seen jumping from the open rear ramp of a large military transport plane high above the ground against a clear blue sky.
Two young US Navy sailors in service dress white uniforms smile for a photograph while posing next to a vintage brass-helmeted deep-sea diving suit on display in an indoor setting.

A formal studio portrait shows a smiling young man named Josh in a U.S. Navy enlisted dress blue uniform, complete with a white dixie cup hat, posing with his hands clasped in front of an American flag and a dark grey backdrop.

Three men in casual motorcycle gear take a break from their ride to sit on a stone wall and pose for a photo at a scenic overlook featuring a large, light-colored canyon and an evergreen forest on a sunny day.
An aerial photograph captures a tandem skydiving pair in the foreground and a solo jumper in the distance as they freefall over a green, populated peninsula jutting into a wide expanse of water.

A man with short brown hair and sunglasses, identified as Josh, is pictured outdoors wearing full scuba gear, including a black tank and vest with yellow hoses, against a backdrop of water and a hazy sky.
Two men in motorcycle gear, including helmets spattered with what appears to be bugs, pose for a photo at night in front of a brick building with a blue neon lottery sign glowing in the background.
Silhouetted against the bright sky, a man climbs a rope ladder from a rigid inflatable boat up the side of a large ship as the boat is suspended over the water.

Two male freedivers explore the vast, submerged remains of a shipwreck in the deep blue ocean, with one man in patterned swim trunks in the foreground and another diver wearing blue fins visible further down near the decaying structure.

A man wearing blue swim trunks, fins, and a snorkel mask is captured mid-dive in clear turquoise water, swimming down towards a vast green coral reef with sunlight filtering through the surface from above.
A man in swim trunks executes a backflip off the side of a military ship into the calm ocean as his crewmates watch from the deck under a bright, hazy sky.
A man wearing a brown t-shirt and a digital sports watch holds a coiled grey rope wrapped around a taped, olive-drab bundle in the warm glow of the sun.

A man in a blue t-shirt kneels to help another man, who has a tattoo on his left arm, adjust his complex scuba diving gear on a sunny day, with a white van and other personnel visible in the background.
A focused man named Josh, wearing a black helmet with a spade symbol and skydiving gear, crouches at the open door of an aircraft, preparing to jump.
Mother is holding a newborn in her arms while sitting on a hospital bed.

A young boy sitting at a kitchen table is holding a photo album and looking at it with a smile. He has brown hair and seems to be engaged in a moment of nostalgia or enjoyment. In the background, there's a glimpse of what appears to be a home setting with a dining table and chairs visible.

This is a black and white photo capturing a precious moment of new life. A baby, barely minutes old, lies peacefully on a hospital bed. The baby's eyes are closed in slumber, wrapped in the soft comfort of a blanket adorned with playful cartoon characters. Despite the monochrome palette of the image, one can almost feel the tender warmth of this little bundle of joy.

This is an image showing two different photos. In the top photo, there is a close-up of a baby sitting in a car seat with a pacifier in their mouth. The baby appears to be asleep and dressed in a onesie. The bottom photo shows another perspective of the same baby now lying down on a white surface, still wearing the onesie but no longer in the car seat. The baby seems calm and is looking directly at the camera.
Black and white photo with a man holding a baby. The man is wearing glasses, scrubs, and a stethoscope around his neck. He is smiling and the infant appears to be looking at the camera.

The image is a split photo featuring a young child. The left side shows an infant seated in a high chair, wearing a white bib and smiling at the camera. The child has dark hair and is dressed in striped clothes with short sleeves. On the right side, there is another photograph of the same child in a relaxed posture, appearing to be asleep or unaware of the camera. In this photo, the child's attention seems to be elsewhere, as the head is turned away from the camera and eyes are closed. The child's outfit is similar, with striped pants and a short-sleeved shirt. There is a neutral background, likely a home environment, with no specific details that stand out.

This is a black and white photo featuring a young child sitting on a carpeted floor. The child appears to be a boy and is looking towards the camera with a slight smile on his face. He has short hair and is wearing what seems to be a sleeper or pajamas.

Black and white photograph of a young child seated in a highchair. The child appears to be looking down at their hands with a curious expression. In the background, there is a glimpse of a kitchen setting with a stove and cabinets visible.
The photo depicts an older woman holding a baby with a green and white sports jersey over her shoulder, in an indoor setting with a plant, flowers, and other home decor visible.
Image shows a baby sitting in a car seat with a contented expression on its face.

The image shows two people in what appears to be a kitchen. On the left side, there is an older man holding a baby close to him. The man has grey hair and is wearing a white shirt. He is smiling and seems to be looking at the camera with the child tucked into his arms. The baby appears calm and content. They are both seated at a kitchen counter or bar. On the right, there's another person who appears to be an adult, although their face isn't clearly visible. In the background, we can see kitchen items such as bottles, bowls, and utensils like a spoon, suggesting that this is a domestic setting. The overall mood of the photo seems warm and familial.
A baby boy sitting on a wicker chair with oversized overalls and smiling at the camera.

The image features a child sitting in a blue sled with another person next to it. They are on what appears to be a snow-covered surface. The child is wearing winter clothing and is looking towards the camera with a slight smile. There's a sense of playfulness captured in this candid moment. The second person, whose face is not visible, seems to be enjoying the sled ride as well. The background is blurred but it suggests an outdoor setting on a snowy day.

A black and white photograph capturing a moment between two individuals at a dock or pier. The person on the left is an infant, likely around 2 years old. On the right, there's an adult standing in shallow water near the shore. They are both facing the camera, but only the adult has facial features visible. The background shows a calm body of water and a pier structure extending into the water.

The image is a vintage black and white photograph of a baby, appearing to be an infant. The baby is lying on its back with both hands near their face and appears to be looking directly at the camera with a slight smile. The baby's hair is light brown or blonde in color. It is wearing a diaper and a patterned blanket. There are no visible texts or distinguishing marks that provide context for the setting or time period.

This is a photo featuring three individuals, likely a family, posing together outdoors. The central figure appears to be a young boy or girl wearing a white shirt and jeans, standing between two adults. On the left, there's an adult female dressed in a sleeveless top and shorts, and on the right, another adult male wearing a plaid shirt and sunglasses. Behind them is a wooden structure that resembles a house or cabin with a visible American flag hanging from one end. The setting suggests a casual, family-oriented occasion, possibly during a warm season considering the attire of the people.

A family of four outdoors on a snowy day. The two older children are dressed warmly and wearing snowshoes; one adult child is standing next to them with their own gear. They seem to be posing for the photo. There's an indication of playful activity in the air, suggesting some sort of game or interaction with the environment.

This is a black and white photograph featuring three individuals standing outside an old stone building with a wooden door. The building appears to be constructed from large stones, and there is visible moss growing on the walls, suggesting it's in an older, possibly rural area. The sky above the photo seems overcast or cloudy, and there are no significant texts or markings visible in the image. In front of the building, there is a small collection of items that could be interpreted as personal belongings. One individual, likely the focal subject of the photograph, stands on the left, slightly in front of the others, holding what appears to be a book or a folder. This person has a hairstyle and clothing typical of the late 20th century. The other two individuals are positioned closer together, slightly behind the first individual, and they also have hairstyles and attire consistent with that era. There is no visible text on any object in the image, nor any obvious symbols or logos that can be discerned.

This is a black and white photograph featuring three individuals posing for a picture in what appears to be snowy weather conditions. The primary subject is a child, standing on the left side of the frame with a smiling expression holding a snowball in their hand. On their right, an adult is kneeling down, holding up another snowball and facing towards the camera. A second child is also visible on the right side of the image, but they are partially obscured by the main subject. The background reveals a residential area with a house, trees, and a clear sky.

The image shows two children hugging each other with one of them having their face close to the other's chest as if whispering or talking quietly. Both children appear to be in a room with a wall-mounted light fixture visible in the background. The child on the left is wearing a dark top and is looking down, while the child on the right has short hair, is wearing a red top, and seems to be looking up towards their companion.

The image is a photograph taken indoors, showing two people posing closely together with smiles on their faces. The person on the left appears to be a man wearing a dark shirt and has his arm around the woman's shoulder. He has short hair and appears to have facial stubble. The person on the right is a woman wearing a light-colored sleeveless top and has her head tilted towards the man with one hand near his face. Both individuals appear to be in their late twenties or early thirties. They are standing at what looks like a restaurant table, which suggests a social or celebratory occasion. The lighting is bright, indicating an indoor setting with artificial lighting. There are menus and a partially visible background featuring dining tables and chairs.
A couple stands side by side in front of a building, with a large sky in the background, posing for their portrait.

The image depicts a couple standing outside a building at night or during early evening, given the lighting conditions. The man appears to be in his late twenties to early thirties and the woman looks like she could be in her mid-twenties to early thirties as well.

The image shows two people holding a certificate. The person on the left is male and appears to be middle-aged, while the one on the right looks younger and could be considered a young adult or an older child.

The image is a photograph showing two people posing together outdoors at night. The man appears to be standing behind the woman and has his arm wrapped around her waist; both individuals are smiling at the camera. The woman seems to have short blonde hair and is wearing a black top. Both are dressed casually, suitable for a cold winter night. They are in front of a storefront with string lights illuminating the scene. The man has a beard and his attire includes a beanie and a plaid shirt, while the woman wears a scarf around her neck. There is no visible text on the image.
Black and white photo of two people standing outside a building with wooden siding, appearing to be in their late thirties or early forties, embracing each other in a moment of affection.

The image depicts an adult couple celebrating or sharing a moment together at what appears to be a casual dining establishment. The man is wearing a plaid shirt and the woman has blonde hair with a darker shade around the roots. They are posing close for the photo, with both smiling, and the man has his arm wrapped around the woman's shoulders. They seem to be enjoying each other's company and possibly celebrating an event or milestone.

In the image, there are two individuals enjoying a day at the beach. They are both covered in what appears to be mud or paint, suggesting they might have participated in a messy activity such as an obstacle course or a themed event. The primary subject is standing closer to the camera, appearing to be a middle-aged man and woman. The setting includes a lake in the background, with some buildings partially obscured by foliage. There are no texts or distinctive logos visible in the image.

The image depicts a couple posing for a photograph on what appears to be a bridge or walkway over water. The male is dressed in a dark jacket with a hood and beanie, while the female wears a red scarf, suggesting it might be cold weather. Both are smiling and seem to be enjoying their time together.

The image depicts two individuals posing for a photograph outdoors. The primary subject appears to be a young adult male with short hair and a beard, wearing a dark gray t-shirt and blue jeans. He is standing next to an adult female who is smiling and has long blonde hair. Both individuals are hugging each other, suggesting a close relationship. They are positioned in front of a home with a brick chimney and a tree behind them. The lighting and shadows indicate it's either dawn or dusk due to the warm hues and soft illumination. The setting appears to be residential with well-maintained landscaping. There are no visible texts or distinguishing marks that provide additional context about the subjects or the location.
The photo shows two people standing at a scenic lookout with a desert landscape and Grand Canyon in the background.

This is a photograph featuring two individuals standing together on what appears to be a rural or forested road. The setting suggests an autumn season due to the fall foliage surrounding the area. One person seems to be male and the other female; both are wearing casual attire suitable for outdoor activities. The environment includes trees with colored leaves, indicating the changing seasons. There's no visible text in the image that provides additional information.
A photo showing a man and woman standing outside a concert venue, taking a selfie together with the audience visible in the background.
A man and woman seated on a tire swing, with a dog standing behind them in a grassy area surrounded by trees.

The image is a color photograph featuring two individuals posing for a picture on what appears to be a street corner. The central figure is an adult male with short hair wearing a green t-shirt with graphic elements and the word 'AMERICA' in large white letters across the front. He is standing slightly behind a female figure, who is smiling at the camera. She has long blonde hair tied back and wears a sleeveless top with a distinctive pattern that includes shades of blue and white, possibly denoting a specific cause or event. Both individuals have sunglasses pushed up to their foreheads. They are standing on a sidewalk in front of a residential house with an American flag flying from the roof. The image has a slight blurring effect, which suggests movement when the photo was taken.

Image shows two individuals posing in front of a waterfall. The person on the left appears to be a middle-aged male with short hair, wearing a dark top and sunglasses on his head. He is smiling and looking at the camera. The person on the right seems to be a young adult female with long hair, also wearing sunglasses and a white top. They are both standing close together and appear to be enjoying their visit. Both individuals have backpacks suggesting they might be on a hike or a trip. The background features a natural landscape with greenery and the waterfall is in focus. The style of the photo is candid, likely taken during a leisure activity or vacation.

A man and woman sitting on the floor indoors with a fireplace behind them. The man is wearing a dark blue shirt, jeans, and boots. The woman is in a light-colored blouse, jeans, and brown shoes. They are looking at something off-frame, and the man is pointing his hand towards it.

The photo captures two people standing atop a rocky outcropping in a scenic location with towering sandstone formations, which appears to be Bryce Canyon or a similar natural attraction. The setting sun casts a warm glow on the scene, illuminating the spires and creating a dramatic sky. In the background, an expanse of desert canyons stretches out, suggesting a remote wilderness location. Both individuals are dressed casually and seem to be enjoying their time in nature.

The image features a man and woman posing with a skeleton in what appears to be a costume party setting. The woman is holding up a hand of a drink. They are wearing party attire, with the man dressed as a chicken wing and the woman in a pineapple costume.
A joyful moment captured between two individuals with drinks at a kitchen counter.
A couple on a balcony with city views, posing for a picture.
Adult couple posing for photo in front of hotel

She is wearing a black tank top with a light-colored bra strap visible, and there is a visible tattoo or permanent makeup marking the inside of her left arm.
